_comment: Model config for answer-monitor runners. Set enabled=false to skip a model. All models use the OpenAI Chat Completions API format. Set OPENAI_BASE_URL to point at a proxy/gateway that serves multiple providers.

models._note: OpenAI — works with both run_monitor.py (Responses API) and run_chat_completions.py
Anthropic Claude via OpenAI-compatible proxy — use run_chat_completions.py only
Google Gemini via OpenAI-compatible proxy — use run_chat_completions.py only
DeepSeek via proxy — use run_chat_completions.py only
Alibaba Qwen via proxy — use run_chat_completions.py only
MiniMax M2 via proxy — use run_chat_completions.py only
Zhipu GLM-5 via proxy — use run_chat_completions.py only
